subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou beholdest faces luminous with the radiance of Thy mercy, and hearts enthralled wherein dwelleth beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی تری وجوها نورانیه فیها نضره رحمانیتک و قلوبا متیمه فیها جمال
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God
